infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Liberty Field needs camera access to capture site photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Liberty Field needs microphone access to record site audio observations.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Liberty Field needs contacts access to import building manager and vendor contact information.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Liberty Field needs photo library access to attach existing photos and documents.

plugins.microphonePermission: Liberty Field needs microphone access to record site audio.

plugins.photosPermission: Liberty Field needs photo library access.
